title: Stash
description: A simple inventory shared amongst all players on the server for trading and temporarily storing items.
body:
# 📦 Stash
Stash is a simple mod designed to provide players with a temporary solution to their hoarding problem or being too far away from each other just to exchange some items. The stash consists of a 54 slot inventory which is available via the `/stash` command and shared between all players. **Items in the stash will be cleared when the server restarts.**

## FAQ
Q: Port to version/Fabric/NeoForge?

A: Not at the moment, sorry.



Q: Can I use this in my Modpack?

A: [Sure](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8797527-obtaining-modpack-permissions)!
